name: essentia
description: Essentia static site with Easyship smart shipping and Stripe Checkout endpoints.

scripts.check: node --check functions/api/easyship-rates.js && node --check functions/api/create-checkout-session.js && node --check functions/api/address-suggest.js && node --check functions/api/test-shipping-countries.js && node --check functions/api/support-message.js && node --check smart-checkout.js && node --check shipping-test.js && node --check support.js
